title: Sony Future Filmmaker Awards Announce 2026 Shortlisted Finalists
content:
ByArushi Jacob

The Sony Future Filmmaker Awards have announced the shortlist for the 2026 edition, which spans the categories of fiction, non-fiction, animation, student, and future format.The chosen filmmakers will join an exclusive program of interactive sessions and masterclasses at the Sony Pictures Studios in Culver City from June 8-11, closing with a gala ceremony on June 11 where the category winners will be announced, awarded cash prizes and Sony Digital Imaging equipment.Established by Creo in partnership with Sony, the Sony Future Filmmaker Awards aim to provide career-defining opportunities for emerging talent by introducing them to the realities of professional filmmaking and equipping them with the tools to advance their work. The fourth edition of the Sony Future Filmmaker Awards received submissions from more than 8,400 filmmakers representing 162 countries and territories around the world.The 2026 shortlist spans perspectives from across the globe. Highlights include stories of the women freedivers of Tamil Nadu risking their lives daily in the waters off Ramanathapuram; a Ukrainian ecologist in the Carpathian Mountains tending to water buffalo and ancient horse breeds; a newly qualified teacher struggling through the highs and lows of her first year in a London classroom; and two siblings growing up inside a Colorado alligator sanctuary. Additionally, when sheep begin disappearing, a Welsh shepherd, whose flock remain untouched, becomes the target of his community’s suspicion; a 90-year-old French piano legend prepares for his final concert, and three North Korean defectors give raw testimony about the invisible forces that held them and what it took to leave.The shortlisted filmmakers will proceed to the next stage of judging, from which the category winners will be selected by the 2026 jury, which consists of Golden Globe-nominated director and producer Will Gluck; President of Film and Television at Pascal Pictures, Rachel O’Connor; Sony Pictures Animation co-director Adam Rosette; and director Justin Chadwick, who returns as jury chair for the fourth consecutive year.Chadwick said, “This shortlist is a testament to the vitality of emerging filmmaking right now. From intimate character studies to urgent documentaries, from experimental animation to fearless student work, these are films that command attention, bold in their vision, accomplished in their execution, and vital in what they have to say. This program exists to give filmmakers of this calibre something beyond accolades: direct, unprecedented access to the inner workings of the industry. The jury faces the enviable but difficult task of choosing winners from work this strong; these filmmakers have set the bar high.”

While the remaining category winners will be announced on June 11, the Sony Future Filmmaker Awards announced the winner of this year’s “Future Format” competition, which asks participants to respond to a technical brief that explores the creative possibilities of storytelling. Nigeria’s Innocent Yama Lamido took home the prize for “Creating Without Permission,” “a meditation on creation and on the spaces between moments.” As part of his prize, Lamido will receive Sony Digital Imaging equipment and is invited to join the program at Sony Pictures Studios in June.

For more information, including the full list of nominees, visitsonyfuturefilmmakerawards.com.
title_zh: 索尼(Sony)未來電影製作人獎宣布2026年入圍決賽的候選人。
content_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

索尼未來電影製作人獎(Sony Future Filmmaker Awards)已公布2026年獲提名的短名單，涵蓋虛構、非虛構、動畫、學生及未來格式等類別。入選的電影製作人將參加於6月8日至11日在卡爾弗城(Culver City)的索尼影業(Sony Pictures Studios)舉行的獨家互動會議和大師班，並於6月11日的盛典上宣布類別獲獎者，頒發現金獎和索尼數位影像設備。該獎項由Creo與索尼合作創立，旨在為新興人才提供職業發展的機會，讓他們了解專業電影製作的現實，並提供推進其作品所需的工具。2026年索尼未來電影製作人獎的第四屆共收到來自162個國家和地區的超過8,400位電影製作人的作品提交。2026年的短名單涵蓋了來自全球的不同視角。亮點包括來自泰米爾納德邦(Tamil Nadu)的女性自由潛水員，她們每天在拉馬納塔布拉姆(Ramanathapuram)的水域中冒著生命危險；一位在喀爾巴阡山脈(Carpathian Mountains)的烏克蘭生態學家，照顧水牛和古老的馬種；一位新任教師在倫敦教室中經歷的高低起伏；以及兩名在科羅拉多州(COLORADO)的鱷魚庇護所中成長的兄妹。此外，當羊群開始失蹤時，一位威爾士牧羊人，雖然他的羊群未受影響，卻成為社區懷疑的對象；一位90歲的法國鋼琴傳奇準備他的最後一場音樂會；以及三名北韓脫北者對於束縛他們的無形力量和離開所需的代價進行真實的證詞。入圍的電影製作人將進入下一階段的評審，最終的類別獲獎者將由2026年的評審團選出，評審團成員包括金球獎提名導演及製片人威爾·格拉克(Will Gluck)；帕斯卡影業(Pascal Pictures)電影及電視總裁瑞秋·奧康納(Rachel O’Connor)；索尼動畫(Sony Pictures Animation)聯合導演亞當·羅塞特(Adam Rosette)；以及連續第四年擔任評審主席的導演賈斯汀·查德威克(Justin Chadwick)。查德威克表示：“這份短名單證明了當前新興電影製作的活力。從親密的人物研究到緊迫的紀錄片，從實驗動畫到無畏的學生作品，這些影片都引人注目，具有大膽的視野，執行上也相當出色，並且在表達上至關重要。這個計畫旨在為這類電影製作人提供超越榮譽的機會：直接、前所未有地接觸行業的內部運作。評審團面臨著一項令人羨慕但困難的任務，從這麼強大的作品中選出獲獎者；這些電影製作人已經設立了高標準。”

在剩餘的類別獲獎者將於6月11日公布之際，索尼未來電影製作人獎(Sony Future Filmmaker Awards)已宣布今年“未來格式”(Future Format)競賽的獲獎者，該競賽要求參賽者回應一個技術簡報，探索敘事的創意可能性。來自尼日利亞的伊諾森·雅馬·拉米多(Innocent Yama Lamido)憑藉作品“無需許可的創作”(Creating Without Permission)獲得了獎項，這是一部關於創作及瞬間之間空間的沉思。作為獎品的一部分，拉米多將獲得索尼數位影像設備，並受邀於6月參加索尼影業(Sony Pictures Studios)的計畫。

欲了解更多信息，包括完整的提名名單，請訪問sonyfuturefilmmakerawards.com。
summary_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

索尼未來電影製作人獎(Sony Future Filmmaker Awards)已公布2026年獲提名的短名單，涵蓋虛構、非虛構、動畫、學生及未來格式等類別。
